name: Liberty Energy Inc.
description: Liberty Energy Inc. is a leading North American energy services company that provides comprehensive completion services and innovative technologies to onshore oil, natural gas, and enhanced geothermal energy producers. Formerly known as Liberty Oilfield Services Inc., the company specializes in hydraulic fracturing and related services, focusing on operational efficiency and sustainable energy solutions. Headquartered in Denver, Colorado, Liberty Energy plays a critical role in the energy supply chain, supporting the development of essential resources through advanced engineering, data-driven analytics, and a commitment to safety and environmental stewardship across the industry.
